sql_preview:
START TRANSACTION;
DELETE
FROM dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info;
INSERT INTO dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info (surface, surface_thickness, surface_number, surface_middle_part)
SELECT DISTINCT
    attr_value AS surface,
    REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 1) AS surface_thickness,
    CASE
        WHEN LOCATE('QW', attr_value) > 0 THEN 'QW'
        ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 2)
        END AS surface_number,
    TRIM(
            REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[^0-9]+', REGEXP_INSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]') + 1, 1)
    ) AS surface_middle_part
FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value
WHERE attr_id = '1015'
  AND REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 1) REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'
  AND STATUS = 1
HAVING surface_number IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info
SET silicon_steel_product_category_code = CASE
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN 'QX'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN 'WQX'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'XNY'
                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_code
    END,
    silicon_steel_product_category_name = CASE
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN '取向硅钢成品'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN '无取向硅钢成品'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN '新能源硅钢成品'
                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_name
        END;

UPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info
SET silicon_steel_product_category_code = CASE
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN 'QX'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN 'WQX'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'XNY'
                                              WHEN surface_middle_part IS NULL AND surface_number LIKE '%W%' THEN 'QX'
                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_code
    END,
    silicon_steel_product_category_name = CASE
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN '取向硅钢成品'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN '无取向硅钢成品'
                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN '新能源硅钢成品'
                                              WHEN surface_middle_part IS NULL AND surface_number LIKE '%W%'
                                                  THEN '取向硅钢成品'
                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_name
        END;
UPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info
SET attr1 =
        CASE
            WHEN surface_middle_part LIKE '%K%' THEN '刻痕'
            ELSE '非刻痕'
            END
WHERE silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX';
COMMIT;
